name: Giant Rat Venom
description: A festering toxin carried by the bites of giant rats.

stages.effect: The bite turns green and fetid and smells foul.
You are permanently Exhausted while at this stage.
Your lungs fill with mucus — after every test of fate, take a Piercing Wound.

name: Black Honey
description: An addictive narcotic; early doses sharpen you before the habit takes hold.

stages.effect: Draw 5 cards in encounters instead of 4 — at the cost of a few teeth. Quitting outright costs 5 charges.
Jittery and sweating: Cups drops to 1 and fine motor-control tests take disfavor. Re-exposure resets this stage.

name: Ghost Lotus
description: A dream-flower that unmoors the mind by degrees.

stages.effect: Euphoria — effects that would prevent sleep no longer trouble you. Costs 1 XP to shake off.
You lose symbolic thought: you cannot read or write, but illusions cannot fool you.
Lost in a waking dream — rewrite the descriptor of one of your motifs.

name: The Great Contagion
description: The dreaded plague of the deep levels. It does not forgive delay.

stages.effect: Red whorls bloom across your skin; take a Piercing Wound.
The sickness bites deep: take Critical damage.
Death. There is no recovery from the final stage.
